The '''''Imac''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that spread navigation buoys around an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] listening post above [[Saheelindeel]].

Although the post was far from Alliance territory, they were destroyed along with the listening satellite in order to divert the Empire from the actual location.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
